---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.column-page}

# Get in Touch

I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and conversations about technology. Feel free to reach out!

---

## Contact Information

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Direct Contact

📧 **Email**: [ojhaprasansha63@gmail.com](mailto:ojhaprasansha63@gmail.com)

📱 **Phone**: +977 9864185792

📍 **Location**: Kathmandu, Nepal

:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
### Social Links

🔗 **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/prasansha-ojha-88387222b](https://www.linkedin.com/in/prasansha-ojha-88387222b/)

🐙 **GitHub**: [github.com/prasanshaojha](https://github.com/prasanshaojha)

💼 **Email**: ojhaprasansha63@gmail.com

:::

::::

---

## Contact Form

Have a specific inquiry? Send me a message below, and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/FORM_ID" method="POST">
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="name" class="form-label">Name</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="name" name="name" required>
  </div>
  
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="email" class="form-label">Email Address</label>
    <input type="email" class="form-control" id="email" name="email" required>
  </div>
  
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="subject" class="form-label">Subject</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="subject" name="subject" required>
  </div>
  
  <div class="mb-3">
    <label for="message" class="form-label">Message</label>
    <textarea class="form-control" id="message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>
  </div>
  
  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send Message</button>
</form>

---

## Other Ways to Connect

- **Collaboration**: Open to discussing potential projects and partnerships
- **Mentorship**: Happy to share knowledge and mentor aspiring developers
- **Speaking**: Available for tech talks, interviews, and panel discussions
- **Freelance Work**: Open for select freelance opportunities

---

## Response Time

I typically respond to inquiries within **24-48 hours**. For urgent matters, please email directly.

:::
